subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ra'is
subcodes.first_line: The Pen of the Most High proclaimeth: O thou who hast imagined thyself to be the most exalted of men
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید ای نفسیکه خود را اعلی الناس دیده و غلام الهی که چشم اهل ملا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
